detectors.description:
GIFT_1_ETH.GetGift(bytes) (GIFT_1_ETH.sol#9-25) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- msg.sender.transfer(this.balance) (GIFT_1_ETH.sol#21)
